title: helichrysum ferrugineum var. gravesii
intro: Helichrysum ferrugineum var. gravesii, also known as the Mountain Silver Tree or Grave's Everlasting, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds such as neryl acetate and alpha-pinene, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum ferrugineum var. gravesii include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, improve wound healing, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
